shared_photos.title: SharedPhoto
shared_photos.description: Uploaded travel photos shared with everyone in the cloud

spotId.description: The tourist spot ID this photo belongs to

uploadedAt.description: Timestamp when the photo was uploaded

wishlist.title: WishItem
wishlist.description: Places suggested by users that they wish to visit

notes.description: Notes on why they want to visit

author.description: Name of the person making the wish

likedBy.description: List of user UIDs who upvoted

custom_spots.title: CustomSpot
custom_spots.description: Spots added from the wishlist to the shared itinerary

wishId.description: Optional reference to the original wish item

dayNumber.description: The day number (1-4) this spot is scheduled on

description.description: Description or notes of the custom spot

type.description: The category type of the spot

createdAt.description: When this spot was added to the itinerary

guide_items.title: GuideItem
guide_items.description: Items in the guide checklists, customizable by users

categoryId.description: The category this item belongs to ('essential', 'gourmet', 'safety')

name.description: Name or title of the checklist/tip item

checked.description: Whether this checklist item is completed

link.description: Optional URL link related to this item

/shared_photos/{photoId}.description: Shared travel memories collection, keyed by spotId

/wishlist/{wishId}.description: A collection storing travel wishes, accessible by everyone

/custom_spots/{spotId}.description: Custom spots added to the itinerary from the wishlist

/guide_items/{itemId}.description: Survival tips and checklist items in the guide view, synced in real time
